security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self'

bundle.longDescription: VANTAGE is a self-hostable satellite-imagery analysis workbench: change detection and placeholder object detection over Sentinel-2 imagery, for defense/ISR analysts. Analysis only — see COMPLIANCE.md. This installer brings up a full container stack (PostGIS, a tiling service, and a placeholder ML detector) plus demo Sentinel-2 imagery. On first launch it pulls the container images automatically if this machine has network access; for genuinely air-gapped deployments, a separate offline image bundle from the same release can be downloaded and placed in the data directory instead — see INSTALL.md and docs/AIRGAP.md.
